posts.author: fatiksahin (Fatih Şahin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I have a leave request form in monday and i converted to pdf format using form viewer, but human resoruces in my office want to see when the hr manager apply the form, it should shows below of the form. How can i create that form, any idea for that problem ?
I attached the image.

image455×502 13.9 KB

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey @fatiksahin, thanks for posting about the leave request form! Can you elaborate on what you mean when you say “apply the form”? What information exactly would you like to have show below the form? Let me know!
